key_themes: Strong quarterly gold production (82,723 oz in March 2026) and sales with YTD on or above guidance
Significant cash buildup to $1.2 billion with zero debt and robust free cash flow
Benefiting from elevated gold prices and rapid growth to a top-tier ASX gold producer
Positive investor sentiment around management competence, resource expansion (Telfer/Havieron), and price targets (850p+)
Mixed analyst views (Citi Buy, recent Macquarie Hold) but dominant bullish narrative on X and forums
summary: Greatland Resources (GGP.L / GGP.AX), a gold and copper producer with key assets at Telfer and Havieron, is generating strongly positive financial sentiment following its March 2026 quarter update showing 82,723 oz gold produced, 4,128 t copper, sales exceeding production, and cash rising $260M to $1.208 billion while remaining debt-free.[[1]](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/commodities/articles/greatland-resources-14-lifts-cash-100005924.html)[[2]](https://www.investegate.co.uk/announcement/rns/greatland-gold--ggp/march-2026-quarter-production-update/9509909) Investors highlight its transformation into the third-largest gold producer on the ASX in just over a year, strong FCF run-rate, and resource growth in a high gold price environment.[[3]](https://x.com/Share_Talk/status/2045476270985625617) X posts and investor discussions are enthusiastic about “stellar progress,” competent management, and further upside, with the share price recently running toward its 52-week high near 800p despite a Macquarie downgrade to Hold.[[4]](https://www.cnbc.com/quotes/GGP-GB)[[4]](https://www.cnbc.com/quotes/GGP-GB)
sources: 10+ recent news articles and RNS on production updates and analyst notes, 15+ relevant X posts (April 2026, focused on $GGP/#GGP, production, cash, MD interviews), LSE.co.uk share chat, ADVFN discussions, Yahoo Finance community, TipRanks analyst summaries, company announcements on ASX/AIM
